page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aims to help improve the speed, objectivity and reproducibility of digital pathology analysis and biomarker interpretation by offering an open, powerful, flexible, extensible software platform for whole slide image analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Aims to help improve the speed, objectivity and reproducibility of digital pathology analysis and biomarker interpretation by offering an open, powerful, flexible, extensible software platform for whole slide image analysis.
